messages.author: alice_chen
messages.text: Checking. Looks like MySQL: 'Deadlock found when trying to get lock; try restarting transaction'. Investigating.

messages.author: carol_kim
messages.text: I see it too. Could be related to recent deploy.

messages.author: alice_chen
messages.text: Found the issue: The idempotency lock (SELECT FOR UPDATE on idempotency_keys) is held while waiti.... Deploying fix.

messages.author: alice_chen
messages.text: Confirmed resolved. Writing up incident report.
